# Full Stack Human

> AI consulting tool by François Schuers — 15+ years of product & tech leadership, packaged as an on-demand AI.

Three interactive personas for structured consulting conversations:
- The Doctor: Diagnoses stuck projects — finds root causes, not symptoms
- The Critic: Honest review — what works, what doesn't, what nobody's telling you
- The Guide: Reframes your question with frameworks and strategic thinking

Each conversation generates a structured report with actionable recommendations.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://fullstackhuman.com): Main landing page (French)
- [English](https://fullstackhuman.com/en): English version
- [Start a Consultation](https://fullstackhuman.com/chat): Choose a persona and begin

## Shared Reports

Public consulting reports are accessible without authentication at:
- `https://fullstackhuman.com/report/{token}` (French)
- `https://fullstackhuman.com/en/report/{token}` (English)

Each report includes the persona's structured analysis, actionable recommendations, and a booking CTA.
